name: Silvermet Inc.
description: Silvermet Inc. was a Canadian-based company primarily focused on the processing of electric arc furnace dust produced by steel manufacturers in Turkey and Spain. The company operated Waelz kiln plants to recover zinc concentrates, which were subsequently treated by zinc smelters. In 2017, Silvermet Inc. underwent a significant corporate transformation by entering into a definitive merger agreement with Global Atomic Fuels Corporation. Following this strategic merger, the combined entity transitioned its primary focus toward uranium development and exploration, eventually operating under the name Global Atomic Corporation.
